40.reason: [Error: The space after %d in scanf causes it to consume extra whitespace, which may lead to incorrect input reading, especially for the last input. It should be scanf("%d",&op);]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Error: The space after %d in scanf causes it to consume extra whitespace, which may lead to incorrect input reading, especially for the last input. It should be scanf("%d",&op);]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  The space after %d causes the program to wait for non-whitespace input, leading to incorrect reading. Should be scanf("%d",&op);
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Error: Trailing space in scanf format string causes it to skip whitespace and expect non-whitespace, which may lead to blocking or incorrect input reading. Should be `scanf("%d", &op);`]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Using "scanf with trailing space" can cause unexpected blocking or input consumption issues; better to use "%d" without trailing space.
